rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE BARBARA SESNON CARTAN TRUSTS FBO HENRY CARTAN, IV, JAMES O. CARTAN, AND IAN SESNON CARTAN U/A DA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Approving Modification Of Trust Terms And For Appointment Of Third Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Generally, a case number pertains to only one trust. Here, this case was created to address three trusts that were created by court order filed on 11/5/02 in PTR-01-282063. Court to determine whether any further orders should be made in this case number. 2) Petitioners request that the original parent trust (the Barbara Sesnon 1987 Trust) be amended; however, that trust is not the subject of this case number. Petitioners also request that the amendment include changes to the Barbara Sesnon Cartan Trust No. 2 F/B/O Henry Cartan; however, that trust is also not the subject of this case number. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 9th amended general order.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF BERNARD M FOSTON SR
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required on the sole issues of whether this petition should be taken off calendar for lack of progress and whether a new status date should be set. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review the Court's 9th Amended General Order which took effect on 02/10/2021 for more information.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their full name. ISSUES (may be addressed at hearing): 1) Court to determine how to proceed. 2) Petition is requesting: a. Court discharge and waive bond as there is no liquid income generated by the trust estate. b. Court approve legal fees of $4,523.50 and $565.50 in costs and secured as a loan against the real property at 5% interest per year. c. Court waive future accounting in the trust estate so long as the real property is the sole trust asset. d. The real property at 135 Miramar Avenue, San Francisco, CA need not be reappraised

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ARMINE MAKASDIJAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/8/2021. Still not filed response to the examiner notes. Issues: 1) Notwithstanding the waiver of account, if the petition and report requests statutory commissions or fees based on any amount other than the amount of the Inventory and Appraisal, detailed schedules of receipts and gains and losses on sales must be included. [CRC 7.705]. 2) Please list the names and last known address of all vested or contingent beneficaries of the trust so the court can determine if they received proper notice. [CRC 7.902]. 3) The petition for final distribution must state specifically how the estate is to be distributed to each distributee, including the net amount of cash (as of a date certain) to be distributed to each beneficiary. [LRSF 14.36 I. 6) a.] 4) Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top cover page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 5/24/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the top page or on the envelope, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KENNETH CARMAN WRIGHT
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court is to determine whether the decedent's unwitnessed letter to T. Rowe Price should be admitted to probate as the decedent's will. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties must, whenever possible, appear remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review the Court's 9th Amended General Order which took effect on 02/10/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ELIAS GUTIERREZ MACIAS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/18/2021. 1) Please explain and provide legal authority for why petitioner has requested bond be waived because all heirs at law are adults and have waived bond when Adriana Sanchez has not waived bond. Please have Adriana Sanchez waive bond or it appears full bond is required. 2) The Duties and Liabilities does not include the phone number for petitioner. Please file a Duties and Liabilities that includes all the required information. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 5/10/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CIPRIANO CAGUIMBAGA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/8/2021. 1) Please explain why the petition has been filed 20 years after Decedent died. 2) Must file Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number. [See LRSF 14.18 E.] 3) Notice of Hearing and Proof of Publication must be re-done matter continued to allow time to re-notice and re-publish. Petitions for probate of lost wills must clearly state on their face that the will is lost and both the published and mailed notice must so state. [LRSF 14.20]. 4) Please address Probate Code 6124. Evidence will be required to overcome the presumption of revocation. 5) The Will is not self-proving and Petitioner must prove the will. 6) Please provide a basis for the court determining the blanks in the typed copy of the Will. Note: Filing a Declaration of Real Property is not required. [See Local Rules.] An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 5/24/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.]
